scripts.setup: bun install && bun run --cwd apps/desktop rebuild:native
scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/desktop build && bun run --cwd apps/mcp-ssh-proxy build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/desktop typecheck && bun run typecheck:packages && bun run --cwd apps/mcp-ssh-proxy typecheck
scripts.typecheck:packages: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/security typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/ssh typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/storage typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/terminal typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/ui-kit typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/runtime typecheck
scripts.test: bun test apps/desktop packages/core packages/security packages/shared packages/ssh packages/storage packages/terminal packages/ui-kit
scripts.test:node: bun run test:mcp-ssh-proxy && bun run test:runtime
